svg.title: AI Gateway architecture
svg.desc: Request flow from client through middleware layers to LLM providers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What authentication does the AI Gateway support?')
sendPrompt('How does JWT RS256 auth work in Axum?')
g.text: JWT RS256 validation, API key lookup

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does rate limiting work with Redis in Axum?')
g.text: Sliding window, per-key quota in Redis

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does request ID and tracing middleware work?')
g.text: Request ID, trace span, structured JSON log

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the router layer do in the gateway?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement streaming proxy for OpenAI in Axum?')
sendPrompt('How does Anthropic streaming differ from OpenAI?')
sendPrompt('How would I add a new LLM provider to the gateway?')
sendPrompt('What metrics should the gateway expose to Prometheus?')
g.text: Prometheus metrics · OpenTelemetry traces · /health readiness probe
